title: Data quality in the 2023 Census | Stats NZ
content:
## Data quality in the 2023 Census
This page includes information to help you understand the composition and quality of the 2023 Census dataset, and the processes and data sources used to improve data quality.
Stats NZ used a combined census model to produce the highest quality data possible for the 2023 Census. Updates to this page will align with the data releases, with the final update scheduled for 7 November 2024.
